completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: Data/ML project
Found 3 existing docs, captured user context for edge-cloud upgrade

findings.user_context: Edge-Cloud collaborative industrial vision system: Upgrade PC-based CV app to distributed architecture with i.MX6ULL edge node (video capture + pan-tilt control via PCA9685 I2C) and PC cloud node (VLM/SAM inference). Scope: I2C driver, Socket communication, video stream integration
